upstream.name: Dhrystone 2.1
upstream.note: Reuses the CVA6-bundled bare-metal Dhrystone with the common BSP (crt.S, syscalls.c). Timing source is the mcycle CSR via syscalls.c getStats; HTIF tohost terminates the run. No external download required; vendored under the CVA6 checkout.

dut: cva6 verilator (cycle-accurate). CVA6 RV64GC is the open-core reference and E1's little core (e1-pro).

cva6_rv64gc.note: CVA6 publishes ~1.7 DMIPS/MHz for the single-issue in-order config; this manifest does NOT assert it — it is the model's expectation pending a measured Verilator run.

fail_closed_until: CVA6 corev_apu Verilator testharness submodules initialized (register_interface, riscv-dbg, axi_mem_if, apb_uart)
